candidate_definitions.text: Implementation of a memory efficient multi-head attention as proposed in the paper, "Self-attention Does Not Need O(n²) Memory"

Implementation of a memory efficient multi-head attention as proposed in the paper, Self-attention Does Not Need O(n²) Memory. In addition, the module will take care of masking, causal masking, as well as cross attention.

[CVPR 2025 Highlight] The official CLIP training codebase of Inf-CL: "Breaking the Memory Barrier: Near Infinite Batch Size Scaling for Contrastive Loss". A super memory-efficiency CLIP training scheme.

This codebase provides the implementation of the Ring Attention with Blockwise Transformers. The model is described in the paper [Ring Attention with Blockwise Transformers for Near-Infinite Context](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2310.01889.pdf) and [Blockwise Parallel Transformer for L…
